title: Russian Manicure
description: Dry manicure focused on detailed cuticle care, skin refinement, gel polish, and calcium gel for a polished natural finish.

title: Gel Pedicure
description: Nail and foot cleanup, exfoliation, hydration, and long-lasting semi-permanent gel color in your preferred shade.

title: Color Acrylic Set
description: A full acrylic set in the color of your choice for durable, statement nails tailored to your preferred length and shape.

title: Baby Boomer
description: A smooth acrylic fade between two tones for a soft, elevated look that stays classic and photo-ready.

title: Perfect French
description: A precise French finish over a structured acrylic base, ideal for clients who want crisp lines and a timeless set.

title: Paraffin Treatment
description: A warm paraffin treatment for hands or feet to boost hydration, comfort, and circulation as an add-on to your visit.
